# La-La Land — Real Estate Lot Platform

> La-La Land (la-la.land) is the largest interactive real estate lot marketplace in Mexico.
> We provide detailed lot data including pricing, dimensions, geographic coordinates,
> availability, and interactive map views across multiple developers and communities.
>
> All prices in Mexican Pesos (MXN). All areas in square meters (m²).
> 1 USD ≈ 17-18 MXN (approximate, check current rate).
>
> Inventory: 1762 lots available for sale, 1687 sold.
> Last updated: 2026-03-03

## Data Access

### MCP Server (Model Context Protocol)
For structured, programmatic access to our lot database, use our MCP server:
- Repository: https://github.com/andresmtzc/lalaland (mcp-server/ directory)
- Install: `npm install @lalaland/mcp-server`
- Transport: stdio (compatible with Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, etc.)
- Requires: SUPABASE_ANON_KEY environment variable
- Tools: search_lots, get_lot_details, list_communities, get_inventory_stats, get_lot_geometry, get_nearby_streetview

### REST API (Supabase)
Our lot data is publicly readable via Supabase REST API:
- Base URL: https://jmoxbhodpvnlmtihcwvt.supabase.co/rest/v1/
- Table: lots
- Auth: requires apikey header (anon key)
- Supports filtering by client_id, fraccionamiento, availability, price, area

### Lot Geometry Files
Raw lot boundary coordinates (polygon vertices) per client:
- https://la-la.land/inverta/lots.txt
- https://la-la.land/cpi/lots.txt
- https://la-la.land/agora/lots.txt
Format: lot name followed by {lat, lng} vertex lines

## Lot Data Schema

Each lot record contains:
- lot_name: Unique identifier (e.g., "lotinverta10-01")
- client_id: Developer identifier ("inverta", "cpi", "agora")
- fraccionamiento: Community/development name
- availability: "Available" (for sale), "Sold", "Featured" (premium), or "Blocked"
- Area in square meters (m²)
- Total price in MXN (Mexican Pesos) — computed as area × price_per_m2
- Price per square meter in MXN/m²
- Geographic centroid (latitude, longitude)
- Perimeter in meters, side lengths, vertex count
- Images: map closeup, landscape context, nearest 360° street view

## How to View a Lot
- Interactive map: https://la-la.land/{client_id}/index.html?lot={lot_name}
- Lot page: https://la-la.land/{client_id}/lot/{community}-{lot_number}.html
- Map closeup: https://la-la.land/{client_id}/pdf/{group}/{lot_name}_map.jpg
- Landscape: https://la-la.land/{client_id}/pdf/{group}/{lot_name}_landscape.jpg

## Features
- Interactive Mapbox-powered satellite maps
- 360-degree street view navigation within developments
- Real-time lot availability updates
- Lot comparison tools
- PDF generation for lot details
- WhatsApp sharing integration
- Payment processing (Stripe) for lot reservations

## Contact
- Website: https://la-la.land
- Currency: MXN (Mexican Peso)

---

# Global Inventory Statistics

- Total lots: 3449
- Available: 1762
- Sold: 1687
- Featured: 9
- Blocked: 0
- Price range (available): $152 MXN — $12,977,500 MXN
- Average price (available): $1,811,240 MXN
- Area range (available): 144.0m² — 5191.0m²
- Average area (available): 396m²

# Developers & Communities

## Inverta Desarrollos

- Website: https://www.inverta.com.mx/
- La-La Land: https://la-la.land/inverta/
- Total lots: 2025 (1026 available, 999 sold)
- Price range: $152 MXN — $12,977,500 MXN
- Area range: 144.0m² — 5191.0m²

### Marsella

- Project: Lomas del Mediterráneo
- City: Veracruz, Ver.
- Map: https://la-la.land/inverta/index.html
- Coordinates: 19.047346, -96.038468 (lat, lng)
- Lots: 30 available, 219 sold
- Price range: $615,600 MXN — $1,308,150 MXN
- Average price: $725,412 MXN
- Area range: 144.0m² — 306.0m²
- 360° street view: available

### Barcelona

- Project: Lomas del Mediterráneo
- City: Veracruz, Ver.
- Map: https://la-la.land/inverta/index.html
- Coordinates: 19.046467, -96.035362 (lat, lng)
- Lots: 136 available, 312 sold
- Price range: $709,200 MXN — $1,521,825 MXN
- Average price: $757,851 MXN
- Area range: 144.0m² — 309.0m²

### Sierra Alta

- Project: Punto Lomas
- City: Veracruz, Ver.
- Map: https://la-la.land/inverta/index.html
- Coordinates: 19.072938, -96.090324 (lat, lng)
- Lots: 83 available, 330 sold
- Price range: $1,299,550 MXN — $3,043,250 MXN
- Average price: $1,482,214 MXN
- Area range: 156.0m² — 370.0m²
- 360° street view: available

### Cortezia

- Project: Arborea
- City: Hermosillo, Son.
- Map: https://la-la.land/inverta/index.html
- Coordinates: 29.12009, -110.909995 (lat, lng)
- Lots: 177 available, 0 sold
- Price range: $160 MXN — $372 MXN
- Average price: $187 MXN
- Area range: 160.0m² — 371.5m²

- Project: Arborea
- City: Hermosillo, Son.
- Map: https://la-la.land/inverta/index.html
- Coordinates: 29.121523, -110.909567 (lat, lng)
- Lots: 86 available, 0 sold

- Area range: 160.0m² — 396.0m²

### Verdalia

- Project: Arborea
- City: Hermosillo, Son.
- Map: https://la-la.land/inverta/index.html
- Coordinates: 29.123108, -110.90849 (lat, lng)
- Lots: 239 available, 0 sold
- Price range: $160 MXN — $496 MXN
- Average price: $187 MXN

- City: Hermosillo, Son.

- Project: Almaterra
- City: Allende, NL

## CPI Desarrollos

- Website: https://www.cpi.mx/
- La-La Land: https://la-la.land/cpi/
- Total lots: 169 (76 available, 93 sold)
- Price range: $2,677,500 MXN — $6,413,995 MXN
- Area range: 1500.0m² — 2807.0m²

### Senterra

- Project: Senterra
- City: Montemorelos, NL

## Ágora Desarrollos

- Website: https://grupoagora.com/
- La-La Land: https://la-la.land/agora/
- Total lots: 507 (268 available, 239 sold)
- Price range: $2,540,000 MXN — $5,564,369 MXN
- Area range: 200.0m² — 607.0m²

### Amani Pietra

- Project: Amani Pietra
- City: Santiago, NL
- Map: https://la-la.land/agora/index.html
- Coordinates: 25.428123, -100.189895 (lat, lng)
- Lots: 89 available, 17 sold
- Price range: $3,175,000 MXN — $5,270,500 MXN
- Average price: $3,417,613 MXN
- Area range: 250.0m² — 415.0m²

### Cañadas Vergel

- Project: Cañadas del Vergel
- City: Santiago, NL
- Map: https://la-la.land/agora/index.html
- Coordinates: 25.441325, -100.178178 (lat, lng)
- Lots: 87 available, 52 sold
- Price range: $2,540,000 MXN — $5,005,832 MXN
- Average price: $2,823,435 MXN
- Area range: 200.0m² — 406.0m²

### Amani Aqua

- Project: Amani Aqua
- City: Santiago, NL
- Map: https://la-la.land/agora/index.html
- Coordinates: 25.436671, -100.179293 (lat, lng)
- Lots: 92 available, 170 sold
- Price range: $3,666,800 MXN — $5,564,369 MXN
- Average price: $4,279,826 MXN
- Area range: 378.0m² — 607.0m²
- 360° street view: available

---

# About La-La Land

La-La Land (https://la-la.land) is a real estate technology platform specializing in
residential lot sales across premium developments in Mexico. Our interactive maps let
buyers explore lots with satellite imagery, 360° street views, and detailed lot data.

Each lot has:
- Exact polygon boundaries with GPS coordinates
- Calculated area, perimeter, and side measurements
- Satellite map closeup and landscape context images
- Nearest 360° street-level photography
- Real-time pricing and availability
- Direct links to view on interactive map

For programmatic access, use our MCP server or REST API (see Data Access section above).
